leadText: Wedgehurst (Japanese: ブラッシータウン Brassie Town) is a small town located at the southern end of the Galar region. To the south is Route 1 and to the east is Route 2.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Origin [ edit | edit source ] Wedgehurst is based on Bowness-on-Windermere , a town situated in south-central Cumbria . [ 1 ] ↑ Pokémon Sword and Pokémon Shield Galar Expedition Guide
